ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (e.g., Darwin Airport) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "instrumentation" TEXT /* Types of meteorological instruments used at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code for the dataset */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* How often data is collected for each product */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code for the dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data collection */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the data collection */,
  "minimum_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "days_of_accumulation" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive days with the same minimum temperature */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., 'Y' for valid) */,
  "day_type_idx" INTEGER /* Index for the type of day (e.g., 0, 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., station, satellite) */,
  "data_quality_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on data quality */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for temperature (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_quality FOREIGN KEY ("quality") REFERENCES quality_metrics ("quality_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES products ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "quality_code" TEXT /* Quality code (e.g., 'Y' for valid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User password (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, image) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data anomaly */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data the anomaly belongs to */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., missing data, incorrect value) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was resolved */,
  "anomaly_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly (e.g., low, high) */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the anomaly was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
